---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or idea for this platform
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I want to route messages to different SIM slots dynamically...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Technical Implementation Details (Optional)**
Any thoughts on code changes, schema additions, or new endpoints needed.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
